name: documentation
description: Generate or improve documentation for a module

team.name: writer
team.role: Technical writer — produces clear, accurate documentation with practical examples

team.name: reviewer
team.role: Documentation reviewer — verifies accuracy, completeness, and clarity

tasks.title: Analyze {{module}} for documentation
tasks.description: Read and understand {{module}} thoroughly. Identify: (1) public API surface, (2) key concepts and data flows, (3) configuration options, (4) common usage patterns. Create an outline for {{style}} documentation with {{scope}} scope. Write the outline to docs-outline.md.

tasks.title: Write documentation for {{module}}
tasks.description: Based on the outline, write {{style}} documentation for {{module}} (scope: {{scope}}). Include: (1) overview and purpose, (2) API reference with type signatures, (3) working code examples, (4) common patterns and gotchas. Write to docs/{{module}}.md.

expectations.criteria: Documentation is accurate, complete for the stated scope, includes working examples, and is clearly written

tasks.title: Review documentation for {{module}}
tasks.description: Review the documentation for {{module}}. Check: (1) technical accuracy — do examples actually work? (2) completeness — are there gaps? (3) clarity — would a new developer understand this? (4) consistency — does it match the codebase?

expectations.criteria: The review confirms accuracy, identifies any gaps, and the documentation meets professional standards
